raw_consumer_statement:
My credit card was delivered to the wrong address and the individual managed to create a unique login and use the card for {$200.00} worth of fraudulent activity. I needed to get a replacement sent out to an alternative address because Barclays failed to utilize the delivery services appropriately twice ( third time I had the card sent to alternative address ). 

Barclays assured me I would not be liable for the charges but now, months later, I receive a notice saying Im responsible. This will lead to a small claims court case if not properly handled.
